encounter.reason: coordination of pulmonary workup, patient reassurance regarding chest X-ray findings

conditions.name: right upper lobe lung opacity, under investigation

document_references.description: Brief telephone note documenting Dr. Olatunde's call to Patricia confirming scheduling of CT chest with contrast (August 8 at Houston Medical Center Imaging) and pulmonology consultation with Dr. Ramaswamy (August 12 at Houston Pulmonary Associates). Documents patient's anxiety about right upper lobe opacity on recent chest X-ray, reassurance provided, and plan for CT imaging followed by pulmonology review. No vitals, labs, or medication changes.
